reviews.comment:
Un desastre siempre lo mismo es la única ypf que siempre tienen problemas yo me fui con mi aplicacion y no me dejaron pagar con la misma y perdí el descuento correspondiente solo tarjeta o efectivo no vuelvo nunca más es un desastre

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, always the same. It's the only YPF that always has problems. I went with my application and they didn't let me pay with it and I lost the corresponding discount. Only by card or cash. I'll never come back. It's a disaster.
